question_html:
What is the passive form of the sentence?

‘You have wasted much time.’
options_html: Much time was wasted by us.
Much time has been wasted by you.
correct_answer_html: Much time has been wasted by you.
solution_html:
Active: has/have + V3

Passive: has/have + been + V3

4 + 63 - 7 ÷ 4 × 3 = ?
solution_html:
4 + 63 - 7 ÷ 4 × 3

=4×63÷7+4−3

=4×9+4−3

=36+4−3=37
